# ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA

## 1. Primary user can greet by name

- Requirement ID: REQ-1
- Sample data: see SAMPLE_DATA.md "Greeting" section
- Inline reference: Hello Avery
- Actor: primary-user
- Acceptance: when the primary-user enters a name and submits, the page renders the greeting; an unauthorized actor receives a permission-denied state; an empty submission renders a form-error.
